texto: Though the Mistress is all about power, confidence and control, she still must give back to her clients who provide the very platform she stands on. The Mistress is not self-made by any means. With her submissive she creates, she designs, she imagines, she becomes. It’s a relationship; it’s an exchange.
explicacao: Orientação direta de T. L. Stone sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “Though the Mistress is all about power, confidence and control, she still must give back to her c…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, bdsm, erotica, útil em momentos de mudanca e erotica.
